key_findings: RM stick reading, 32 sticks batched per tile-row, CB page_size=tile_size, TensorAccessor pattern
untilize helper with WaitUpfront mode, RM stick writing pattern, output CB tile-sized pages
batchnorm compute pattern with per-channel mean/var/weight/bias, eps CB, den CB, FPU and SFPU paths, binary_dest_reuse_tiles

choice: two-pass single-DRAM-read with persistent tilized CB
rationale: Tilize all input tiles for one sample into persistent CB, compute stats then normalize from same data, untilize output. Avoids multiple DRAM reads.

choice: Manual reduce_tile for stats, NOT reduce helper
rationale: Reduce helper cannot address arbitrary column offsets within a CB for group-wise column subsets. Manual reduce_tile with explicit tile indexing is needed.
Per-channel values require full tiles with 32 distinct column values replicated across 32 rows. Host prepares this; reader reads tiles directly.
